Implemented Wikiwiki V1 CLI loop

Implemented Wikiwiki V1 CLI loop

Home / Devlog
Devlog

What happened

Added append-only record revisions and tombstones, generic record lifecycle commands, symbol add, local search, richer spin draft templates, symbols and links rendering, package-ready metadata, CI, and Node test coverage.
